how_it_works.title: Select Establishment Type
how_it_works.description: Salon, specialist, barbershop, or SPA — AI will adapt the template to your business.

how_it_works.title: Launch AI
how_it_works.description: AI will generate structure, texts, and design — with services and booking.

how_it_works.title: Customize Details
how_it_works.description: Add work photos, prices, and publish — website is ready to welcome clients.

faq.question: How is Promto different from regular builders?
faq.answer: Promto uses AI for content generation — you don't need to create texts and design manually. Describe your business and get a ready website.

faq.question: What types of beauty businesses are supported?
faq.answer: The builder is suitable for beauty salons, barbershops, SPAs, nail technicians, cosmetologists, and massage therapists.

faq.question: Can I add online booking for services?
faq.answer: Yes, you can easily set up a booking form on the website — client selects service, specialist, and time.

faq.question: Do I need a programmer for setup?
faq.answer: No, the builder is fully visual — any user without technical knowledge can manage it.

faq.question: How will the website look on mobile devices?
faq.answer: All websites are responsive — they automatically adapt to smartphone or tablet screen size.

faq.question: How much does the builder cost?
faq.answer: Start for free. Paid plans unlock additional features and the ability to connect your own domain.
